title: Page header
description: Component name and description — the brief's title card

sections.name: Exact component name as it appears in the Figma library. No abbreviations, no prefixes.
sections.description: 1-3 sentences covering: (1) what the component is, (2) its primary use case, (3) what makes it distinct from similar components. Never start with 'A component for...' — lead with what it does.

qualityRules: Description must be 1-3 sentences, not a single phrase
Description must mention the primary use case specifically
Description must differentiate from similar components (e.g., Text Input vs Textarea)
Name must exactly match the Figma library component name
No marketing language — factual, concise, technical
